title: 1900 census: surname 'Hollis' misspelled as 'Hollins' on Ward 3 page 14
body: The 1900 federal census transcription for Annapolis Ward 3, page 14, lists the family as 'Hollins'. The original enumerator sheet clearly reads 'Hollis'. Requesting a correction to the transcribed surname.

title: Missing source citation for Mary Ann Ridout birth record
body: The birth entry for Mary Ann Ridout (1848) has no source citation. It should reference Maryland State Archives, Anne Arundel County parish register. Adding the citation for verifiability.

title: Death date typo on Thomas Basil headstone entry (1913 not 1931)
body: The cemetery index lists Thomas Basil's death year as 1931. The headstone photo and the burial register both read 1913. Requesting the year be corrected.

title: Duplicate burial entry for Sarah Contee in St. Anne's index
body: Sarah Contee appears twice in the St. Anne's cemetery index with the same plot number. One entry should be removed to avoid double-counting.

title: 1910 census: household head age transposed (47 recorded as 74)
body: In the 1910 census transcription for the Dorsey household, the head-of-household age reads 74. The original sheet shows 47. Requesting the digits be corrected.

title: Add National Archives film number to 1880 census references
body: The 1880 census citations reference the census year but omit the National Archives microfilm roll number. Adding the roll numbers so entries can be verified against the original film.

title: Marriage date off by one year for Ridout-Hollis union (1871 vs 1872)
body: The marriage record for the Ridout-Hollis union is dated 1872. The Anne Arundel County marriage license index gives 1871. Requesting the date be corrected to match the license.

title: Broken link to Maryland State Archives parish register scan
body: The citation template links to a Maryland State Archives scan that now returns a 404. The archives reorganized their catalog; updating to the current stable URL.

title: 1920 census: place of birth for immigrant listed as blank
body: The 1920 census row for John Weber has a blank place-of-birth field. The original enumerator sheet records 'Germany'. Requesting the field be filled in from the source.

title: Given name 'Cornelius' abbreviated inconsistently across records
body: The given name Cornelius appears as 'Cornl.' in some rows and spelled out in others. Requesting we standardize to the full name with the abbreviation noted in the source field.

title: Plot number missing for the Brice family section
body: Several Brice family headstone entries have no plot number recorded. The sexton's map assigns them to Section C. Requesting the plot numbers be added from the map.

title: 1930 census: middle initial dropped from Ann E. Dorsey
body: The 1930 census transcription lists 'Ann Dorsey' but the original records 'Ann E. Dorsey'. Requesting the middle initial be restored to match the sheet.

title: Birth year for Emma Weems recorded as 1855, should be 1885
body: The birth record for Emma Weems shows 1855, which conflicts with her 1900 census age. The parish register confirms 1885. Requesting the year be corrected.

title: Add citation for the 1890 Annapolis city directory entries
body: The city-directory-derived rows lack a source. Requesting we add the 1890 Annapolis city directory as the citation, with page numbers where known.

title: Headstone inscription reading uncertain for weathered marker
body: The marker in row 12 is badly weathered and the current reading may be wrong. Requesting a second reader compare against the archived rubbing photo before we finalize the name.

title: County field says 'Anne Arundal', should be 'Anne Arundel'
body: Several rows spell the county as 'Anne Arundal'. This should be 'Anne Arundel' throughout. Requesting a find-and-replace with review.

title: Relationship-to-head field mislabels grandchild as child
body: In the 1910 Weems household the grandchild is coded as 'child'. The original sheet reads 'grandchild'. Requesting the relationship code be corrected.

title: Duplicate cemetery entry differs only in capitalization
body: 'McKENNEY' and 'McKenney' are two rows for the same person. Requesting we merge to the correctly cased single entry and keep one plot reference.

title: Correct 1900 census surname 'Hollins' to 'Hollis' (Ward 3 p.14)
body: Pull request applying the surname correction from issue #100: 'Hollins' to 'Hollis' on the 1900 census Ward 3 page 14 rows, with the enumerator sheet cited.

title: Occupation field abbreviations undocumented
body: Occupation entries use abbreviations like 'Wtrmn' and 'Frmr' with no key. Requesting we add a legend to the README so readers can expand them.

title: Death record for Basil Dorsey missing month and day
body: The death record for Basil Dorsey lists only the year. The cemetery register gives the full date, March 4 1902. Requesting the month and day be added.

title: Add source photo reference for Section A headstones
body: The Section A entries have no photo reference. I have archived photos on file; requesting we add the photo IDs so entries can be verified.

title: 1880 census: two households merged into one row
body: Rows for dwelling 118 and 119 were transcribed as a single household. The original sheet shows two separate dwellings. Requesting the row be split.

title: Standardize date format to ISO across vital records
body: Vital-record dates mix 'MM/DD/YYYY' and written-out formats. Requesting we adopt YYYY-MM-DD consistently, preserving the original text in a source note.

title: Wrong cemetery assigned to the Weems family markers
body: The Weems markers are indexed under St. Anne's but are actually at Cedar Bluff. Requesting the cemetery field be corrected for those rows.

title: Add parish register citation for 1848 Ridout births
body: Pull request adding the Maryland State Archives parish register citation to the 1848 Ridout birth rows, resolving issue #101.

title: Column header 'birth_dt' inconsistent with 'birth_date' elsewhere
body: One data file uses 'birth_dt' while the rest use 'birth_date'. Requesting the header be renamed so the files merge cleanly.

title: Document how to cite the Anne Arundel marriage license index
body: New contributors keep formatting the marriage license index citation differently. Requesting we add a worked illustration to the citation guide.

title: 1900 census: age recorded as 8 months entered as 8 years
body: An infant recorded as '8/12' (eight months) was transcribed as 8 years. Requesting the age be corrected to reflect months, per the census convention.

title: Maiden name missing for married women in Section B
body: Several Section B entries list only married surnames. Where the marriage index gives a maiden name, requesting we add it in the maiden-name field.

title: Year 1899 mistyped as 1999 in a death record
body: A death record shows 1999, clearly a typo for 1899 given the person's 1820s birth. Requesting the year be corrected.

title: Correct grandchild relationship code in 1910 Weems household
body: Pull request applying the relationship-code fix from issue #151, changing 'child' to 'grandchild' with the enumerator sheet cited.

title: Compass direction of Section D rows appears reversed
body: The plot map suggests Section D rows are indexed east-to-west but the sexton's map runs west-to-east. Requesting someone verify the ordering against the map.

title: Add a template for citing digitized newspaper obituaries
body: Obituary-sourced death records have no citation template. Requesting we add one covering the newspaper name, date, and page.

title: 1920 census: dwelling number skipped between 44 and 46
body: Dwelling 45 is missing from the 1920 transcription. The original sheet includes it. Requesting the skipped household be transcribed and inserted.

title: Birth-death dates yield an impossible negative lifespan
body: One entry lists death before birth, so the computed age is negative. Likely the two dates were swapped. Requesting they be checked against the headstone photo.

title: Second given name dropped for Charles Henry Weems
body: The record reads 'Charles Weems' but the parish register and census both give 'Charles Henry Weems'. Requesting the middle name be restored.

title: Add National Archives roll numbers to 1880 census rows
body: Pull request adding the microfilm roll numbers requested in issue #112 to the 1880 census references so the rows are independently verifiable.

title: Verify uncertain first name on partially buried marker
body: Row 31's first name is a best guess from a partially buried marker. Requesting a second reader confirm before we mark it as sourced.
